data: {"generalSituation":"A trough of low pressure will continue to affect the coast of Guangdong and the northern part of the South China Sea today and tomorrow. There will still be heavy showers and squally thunderstorms over the region. With the subtropical ridge over the western North Pacific extending westwards in the latter part of this week, showers will ease off gradually over Guangdong. The weather will improve and become very hot on Tuen Ng Festival to early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260617","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 on high ground at first.","forecastWeather":"Cloudy with occasional showers and squally thunderstorms.
